title: Culver City
excerpt: There are restaurants and a grocery store within walking distance, along with a park, the bank, and the post office. And we are about 6 miles from the ocean. We are so excited about calling Culver City home.
body: There are restaurants and a grocery store within walking distance, along with a park, the bank, and the post office. And we are about 6 miles from the ocean. We are so excited about calling Culver City home.
